summary: Read-only plan result. #62514 remains the open non-security canonical issue for the WebUI image-input/tool-calling behavior report. #63710 is a hydrated open PR but is explicitly marked security_sensitive in the preflight artifact, so it is quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling and is not used for merge, closeout, or fixed-by-candidate planning.
